name: vba-lint-mcp
description: MCP server providing VBA code inspections, linting, and parse tree analysis

scripts.generate-parser: rm -rf src/parser/generated && antlr4ng -Dlanguage=TypeScript -visitor -listener -o src/parser/generated grammar/VBALexer.g4 && antlr4ng -Dlanguage=TypeScript -visitor -listener -lib src/parser/generated/grammar -o src/parser/generated grammar/VBAParser.g4
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run generate-parser && npm run build
